evals.prompt: 帮我做一个 GitHub 本周热榜的小红书图文笔记。
evals.expected_output: Creates the full GitHub Trending weekly Top10 Xiaohongshu package: current source records, 1 cover + 10 detail image prompts/images, 3:4 validation, clean zip containing only valid PNGs, title options, caption, and hashtags.

evals.prompt: 今天的 AI 日报，做成小红书图文，不要视频口播，8 张左右卡片。
evals.expected_output: Creates a daily AI report carousel, verifies current primary sources, selects 5-8 items, and outputs concise card-by-card copy plus Xiaohongshu caption.

evals.prompt: 我给你几个 AI 工具链接，帮我整理成小红书卡片，别写成公众号文章。
evals.expected_output: Uses provided links first, verifies facts where freshness is implied, and outputs scan-friendly social cards instead of long article prose.
